signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose slightly to **2.16%** in March 2026 (year-over-year), up from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34%; this data was updated on April 2, 2026[2].
